templates.title: 2D Character Animation Suite
templates.prompt: Professional 2D character animation showcasing full emotional range, character performing subtle acting with micro-expressions, eyebrow raises, lip sync with phoneme shapes, breathing idle animation, weight shifts, hand gestures with finger articulation, facial rig demonstrating happy to sad transition, squash and stretch on dialogue emphasis, overlapping action on hair and clothing, silhouette-readable poses, appeal through asymmetry, animation on 2s with selective 1s for rapid movements
templates.negative_prompt: stiff puppet animation, symmetrical poses, no weight, floating movements, robotic expressions
templates.lighting: rim light separation, mood-based key lighting

templates.title: 3D Pixar-Style Character Scene
templates.prompt: Pixar-quality 3D animated scene, appealing character with large expressive eyes discovering magical object, toon shader with subsurface scattering on skin, physically accurate hair simulation with stylized clumping, emotion-driven pupil dilation, subtle facial asymmetry for appeal, cloth simulation with cartoon physics, rim lighting creating silhouette pop, depth of field focusing attention, particle dust motes in volumetric lighting, anticipation in every gesture, thinking poses before actions
templates.negative_prompt: uncanny valley, realistic human proportions, flat lighting, no subsurface scattering, stiff hair
templates.post_effects: depth of field, motion blur, color grading

templates.title: Anime Sakuga Action Sequence
templates.prompt: High-impact anime sakuga animation sequence, character charging energy with hair flowing upward, speed lines radiating from impact points, smear frames creating motion trails, impact frames held for 3-4 frames with screen shake, debris particles with physics, camera rotating 360 degrees during special attack, speedline backgrounds during movement, Yutaka Nakamura-inspired timing, irregular frame timing for impact, effects animation on 1s, character on 2s and 3s, climactic slash with light beam
templates.negative_prompt: western cartoon style, consistent frame timing, no impact frames, static camera, no effects
templates.effects: energy particles, light beams, screen shake, debris

templates.title: Stop Motion Craft Animation
templates.prompt: Handcrafted stop motion animation with visible fingerprints on clay, paper cut-out elements with subtle texture, replacement animation for facial expressions, practical lighting creating real shadows, slight camera wobble for authentic feel, 12fps on 2s for stop motion aesthetic, armature-based character with realistic weight, fabric clothing with wire support, miniature set with forced perspective, depth of field from real camera optics, cotton wool clouds, frame-by-frame adjustments visible
templates.negative_prompt: smooth digital animation, no texture, perfect stability, CGI elements, digital effects
templates.materials: polymer clay, paper, fabric, wire armatures

templates.title: Motion Graphics Explainer
templates.prompt: Clean motion graphics explainer animation, kinetic typography with words transforming into icons, infographic elements building procedurally, data visualization with animated charts growing, flat design icons with subtle 3D extrusion, smooth bezier motion paths, color coding for information hierarchy, transition wipes between sections, null object parenting for complex movements, expression-driven animations, modular design system, easing graphs for professional motion, trim paths revealing illustrations
templates.negative_prompt: cluttered layout, harsh transitions, no hierarchy, amateur easing, static text
templates.audio_sync: motion timed to voiceover and music beats

templates.title: Cartoon Comedy Timing Masterclass
templates.prompt: Masterful cartoon comedy sequence with perfect timing, character slipping on banana peel with anticipation, hang time at peak of arc, scrambling legs before fall, exaggerated takes with eyes popping, multiple bounce impacts with decreasing height, stars circling head, accordion squash on landing, rubber hose limbs during recovery, breaking fourth wall with embarrassed look to camera, comedic sound effect timing, rule of threes for gag escalation, callback to earlier setup
templates.negative_prompt: poor timing, realistic physics, no exaggeration, serious tone, predictable gags

templates.title: Children's Story Animation
templates.prompt: Gentle children's storybook animation, soft watercolor textures with visible brush strokes, friendly animal characters with simple shapes, slow pacing for young viewers, educational counting elements integrated naturally, characters speaking directly to audience, large clear gestures for communication, pastel color palette with no harsh contrasts, repetitive motions for learning, nursery rhyme rhythm in movement, safety-conscious content, rounded edges on everything, smiling sun and clouds
templates.negative_prompt: fast pacing, scary elements, sharp objects, complex narratives, small details
templates.visual_safety: rounded shapes, soft colors, friendly faces

templates.title: Abstract Art Animation
templates.prompt: Mesmerizing abstract animation with morphing geometric shapes, colors bleeding and blending like liquid paint, synchronization to musical rhythm, Kandinsky-inspired composition in motion, shapes pulsing and breathing organically, particle systems creating and destroying forms, mathematical patterns like fractals evolving, color theory in motion with complementary transitions, negative space as active element, golden ratio spiral movements, texture overlays shifting, generative art aesthetics
templates.negative_prompt: representational imagery, static composition, random movement, no rhythm, muddy colors

templates.title: 1930s Rubber Hose Animation
templates.prompt: Authentic 1930s rubber hose animation style, black and white with film grain, characters with pie-cut eyes and white gloves, noodle-like limbs bending impossibly, synchronized movement to jazzy soundtrack, repeating walk cycles, bouncing to rhythm, steamboat whistle gags, anthropomorphic objects dancing, film scratches and gate weave, vintage title cards, iris wipes between scenes, Max Fleischer rotoscope influence, synchronized musical movement
templates.negative_prompt: modern colors, digital cleanliness, realistic anatomy, complex shading, still moments

templates.title: Mixed Media Collage Animation
templates.prompt: Innovative mixed media animation combining 2D drawn elements, 3D CGI objects, stop motion puppets, and live-action footage, seamless compositing with matching lighting, paper texture overlays unifying different media, rotoscoped live-action integrated with cartoon characters, photographic backgrounds with animated foregrounds, digital paint over practical elements, split-screen showing multiple techniques, creative transitions between media types, experimental layering with transparency, shadows connecting different elements
templates.negative_prompt: single medium only, poor compositing, mismatched lighting, no integration, jarring transitions
